creator: mk@nic-nac-project.org
text:
Created attachment 190011
svn diff to upgrade dsbmixer-1.2 to dsbmixer-1.3.1

Changes:

- Support for setting the sysctl variables hw.snd.latency, hw.snd.maxautovchans and hw.snd.vpc_mixer_bypass has been added. (1.3)

-  A bug that lead to a crash when DSBMixer wasn't able to find a system tray has been fixed. (1.3.1)

QA:
portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.1Ramd64, 103Ri386)
